identity_preservation: Candidate attempted the same route-selection field identity and did not redefine the field.
regression_results: failed latency residual floor during monitor
authority_check: candidate stayed within same authority and did not expand route execution rights
evaluator_independence: External review marked monitor failure and owns the rollback decision.
residual_escrow: residual: failed latency floor preserved for later review
rollback_plan: Restore impl://route-selector-v0 and keep failed candidate quarantined.
canary_scope: canary route was stopped after monitor failure
non_claims: does not prove runtime rollback behavior
